title: Dev v0.5.11 Feedback Upload Hard Fix
notes:
Replaces feedback submission with a hard-verified JSON upload path so new feedback files are not empty/broken.

Changes:
- Replaces the feedback-submit upload handler with a direct hard upload path.
- Builds the feedback JSON string once.
- Saves that exact JSON locally first.
- Uploads that exact JSON text to GitHub as base64.
- Reads the GitHub file back after upload.
- Parses the remote GitHub JSON.
- Verifies remote feedbackId matches the local feedbackId.
- Shows Remote JSON verified and Remote feedback ID in the result.
- Keeps Feedback / Bug Report in the left sidebar.
